final:
// // This module is designed to conditionally load data into a 16-bit register based on control signals. However, it does not actually capture data on the rising edge of the clock when the enable signal is active. Instead, it updates the register only on the falling edge of the clock.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input en,
  input byte_lo,
  input byte_hi,
  input [15:0] d,
  output reg [15:0] q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
      q <= 16'b0;
    end else if (en) begin
      if (byte_lo) begin
        q[7:0] <= d[7:0];
      end
      if (byte_hi) begin
        q[15:8] <= d[15:8];
      end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to conditionally load data into a 16-bit register based on control signals. However, it does not actually capture data on the rising edge of the clock when the enable signal is active. Instead, it updates the register only on the falling edge of the clock.
